meaning: <俄> Komitet Gosudarstvennoi Bezopasnosti 苏联国家安全委员会(克格勃)
examples: The KGB never had anything like it.
Within two years, he left the KGB altogether.
This suspicion tainted the KGB careers of all four.
Putin also set about appointing former KGB colleagues to high posts in government and business.
And Vladimir Putin, as we all know, was part of the KGB during that time period.
